description: Council Architecture session produces all 9 agent sections for a SaaS product brief

input.core_problem: Engineering teams lack visibility into workforce capacity and allocation
input.primary_persona: VP Engineering at mid-market SaaS company, frustrated by spreadsheet-based capacity planning

pass_criteria.accuracy: All 9 agent sections present with substantive content
pass_criteria.format: Structured output with clear section headers
pass_criteria.hallucination: No fabricated library names or non-existent AWS services

description: Council Validation session produces findings table and ship verdict

pass_criteria.accuracy: Findings table with severity ratings and file locations
pass_criteria.format: Structured findings with ID, Severity, Category, Location columns
pass_criteria.hallucination: No fabricated CVE numbers or non-existent compliance clauses
